title: 4 CPS Admin Security Officer Management
body_text:
4	CPS Admin Security Officer Management
4.1	Overview of CPS Admin Security Officer Management
CPS Admin Security Officers can create, modify, and delete Client Centre Users on CPS Admin and on the User Management Application. CPS Admin Security Officers can also delete and modify other CPS Admin Security Officers via the User Management application (with the exception of resetting passwords and assigning administrative rights to applications ГўВҖВ” which gives the CPS Admin Security Officer the ability to assign those applications to others). Also, if you use a realm, it can only be managed in CPS Admin by CentralВ 1. For information on how CPS Admin Security Officers assign and manage 2-step security tokens via User Management, see the User Management Part.
Authorized representatives of your financial institution appoint CPS Admin Security Officers. Since CPS Admin and User Management operate in a dual custody environment, a minimum of two CPS Admin Security Officers per financial institution is required.
4.2	Adding a CPS Admin Security Officer
CPS Admin Security Officers canГўВҖВҷt create other CPS Admin Security Officers. These requests must be sent to CentralВ 1. Proceed as follows to create a CPS Admin Security Officer:
Complete a CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918, for each new CPS Admin Security Officer. See Figure 1.
ГўВ‘
Financial Institution Name
ГўВҲВ’
Record the name of your financial institution.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
CPS Admin Security Officer Details
ГўВҲВ’
Record the CPS Admin Security OfficerГўВҖВҷs name, contact information, user ID, and home (primary) transit number.
ГўВҲВ’
Decide whether to assign the CPS Admin Security Officer to a realm. CPS Admin Security Officers who donГўВҖВҷt have a realm can manage all your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs Client Centre Users whether or not the Client Centre User has a realm. However, if the CPS Admin Security Officer is assigned to a realm, they can only manage Client Centre Users with the same realm.
ГўВҲВ’
Have the CPS Admin Security Officer sign this section.
ГўВ‘Вў
Personal Access Rights
ГўВҲВ’
List the applications to which the CPS Admin Security Officer requires personal access. Provide the parameters if applicable (e.g., group ID, transit number). Information on managing application permissions is generally available in the procedures associated with the product. Consolidated information on managing application permissions is also located in the User Management Part. Although the look and feel is different in User Management, the consolidated descriptions may be useful.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Administrative Rights
ГўВҲВ’
List the applications to which the CPS Admin Security Officer can assign Client Centre Users (via CPS Admin and User Management) and other CPS Admin Security Officers (via User Management).
Example:	If a CPS Admin Security Officer has administrative rights to the Wires application, they can assign others to this application. The CPS Admin Security Officer wonГўВҖВҷt have access to Wires directly unless Wires is also listed under the Personal Access Rights section of the form.
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Financial Institution Authorization
ГўВҲВ’
Ensure that two authorized signing officers sign the form.
ГўВҲВ’
Forward the form to your central credit union as directed on page 2.
ГўВ‘ВҘ
Provincial Central Credit Union Authorization
ГўВҲВ’
This section is completed by your provincial central, if applicable. The provincial central will verify the signatures in the preceding section, have two of its signing officers (on file with CentralВ 1) sign the form, and forward the form to CentralВ 1 for processing.
Figure 1: CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918
Retain a copy of the form for your records.
CentralВ 1 will communicate a unique one-time password to the new CPS Admin Security Officer. See Chapter 7, Password Registration and Login Process, for procedures on registering a Client Centre password.
Have another CPS Admin Security Officer assign a 2-step security token to the new CPS Admin Security Officer. See the 2-Step Security Part for procedures.
Related Information
CPS Admin Appointment Certificate,
Form 1918
4.3	Modifying or Deleting a CPS Admin Security Officer via CentralВ 1
There are two ways to manage your CPS Admin Security Officers. You can either send a written request to CentralВ 1 to make a change on your behalf, or you can make the change directly on the User Management application. For the most part, CPS Admin Security Officers can modify and delete other CPS Admin Security Officers via the User Management application. This includes:
Adding, removing, and unlocking a 2-step security token
Updating the status of a CPS Admin Security Officer (e.g., from ГўВҖВңLockedГўВҖВқ to ГўВҖВңActiveГўВҖВқ)
Important
:	Ensure that a locked status isnГўВҖВҷt the result of an unauthorized login attempt.
Updating the CPS Admin Security OfficerГўВҖВҷs name or other personal information. The user ID isnГўВҖВҷt editable.
Adding or deleting personal access to applications
Deleting a CPS Admin Security Officer
See the User Management Part for procedures on modifying and deleting CPS Admin Security Officers and Client Centre Users via that application.
The only changes CPS Admins canГўВҖВҷt make to other CPS Admins via the User Management application are:
Changing the realm (as thatГўВҖВҷs only available on CPS Admin, not the User Management application)
Resetting passwords
Assigning administrative rights (i.e., the ability to assign applications to other Client Centre Users and CPS Admin Security Officers).
Those requests must be made in writing, as described below.
To modify or delete a CPS Admin Security Officer via CentralВ 1:
Complete the CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035. See Figure 2.
ГўВ‘
CPS Admin Security Officer Details
ГўВҲВ’
Record your financial institutionГўВҖВҷs name and the CPS Admin Security OfficerГўВҖВҷs home (primary) transit number, name, user ID, and contact information.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Change Request Details ГўВҖВ“ Request Type
ГўВҲВ’
To delete a CPS Admin Security Officer, select
Delete CPS Admin Security Officer
. Deleting a Client Centre user ID is permanent. The deleted user ID canГўВҖВҷt be used again.
ГўВҲВ’
To modify a CPS Admin Security Officer, select the check box beside the appropriate change. Provide additional information where indicated.
ГўВ‘Вў
Change Request Details ГўВҖВ“ Action Type
ГўВҲВ’
If adding, modifying, or deleting the CPS Admin Security OfficerГўВҖВҷs access to an application, select
Add
,
Modify
, or
Delete
in the Action column.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Change Request Details ГўВҖВ“ Personal Access Rights
ГўВҲВ’
To add, modify, or delete an application to which the CPS Admin Security Officer requires personal access, record the name of the application under the Personal Access Rights column. Provide the parameters, if applicable (e.g., group ID, transit number). Information on managing application permissions is generally available in the procedures associated with the product. Consolidated information on managing application permissions is also located in the User Management Part. Although the look and feel is different in User Management, the consolidated descriptions may be useful.
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Change Request Details ГўВҖВ“ Administrative Rights
ГўВҲВ’
To add, modify, or delete an application to which the CPS Admin Security Officer can assign Client Centre Users (via CPS Admin and User Management) and other CPS Admin Security Officers (via User Management), record the name of the application under the Administrative Rights column.
ГўВ‘ВҘ
Financial Institution Authorization
ГўВҲВ’
Ensure that two authorized signing officers sign the form.
ГўВҲВ’
Forward the form to your central credit union as directed on page 2.
ГўВ‘ВҰ
Provincial Central Credit Union Authorization
ГўВҲВ’
This section is completed by your provincial central, if applicable. The provincial central will verify the signatures in the preceding section, have two of its signing officers (on file with CentralВ 1) sign the form, and forward the form to CentralВ 1 for processing.
Figure 2: CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request, Form 2035
Retain a copy of the form for your records.
Related Information
CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request,
Form 2035
4.4	Reviewing CPS Admin Security Officers for Inactivity and Appropriate Access
To reduce the risk of unauthorized access to CPS Admin, User Management, and the applications they protect, it is important to regularly review all CPS Admin Security Officers.
Your financial institution is responsible for ensuring that its CPS Admin Security Officers are:
Deleted if they no longer require CPS Admin and User Management access
Deleted if they are no longer employees of your financial institution
Note: 	CPS Admin Security Officers should be deleted immediately upon termination of employment.
Assigned to applications that accurately reflect their job responsibilities
To conduct reviews of CPS Admin Security Officers, evaluate the CPS Admin Appointment Certificate, Form 1918, and CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Requests, Form 2035, that were sent to your central credit union. Ensure that the information recorded on the forms is still valid. Submit a CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request to your central credit union to change the applications to which a CPS Admin Security Officer has access or to delete a CPS Admin Security Officer. Alternatively, make the necessary changes via the User Management application.
In addition, CentralВ 1 will review the last login date of each CPS Admin Security Officer on a regular basis. CentralВ 1 will disable CPS Admin Security Officers who havenГўВҖВҷt logged in to CPS Admin for 13 months. After a further 90 days, CentralВ 1 will delete the userГўВҖВҷs account. A deleted account can be recovered for up to 90 days.
Related Information
CPS Admin Appointment Certificate,
Form 1918
CPS Admin Modification/Deletion Request,
Form 2035
END
